footer.brandSlogan: "Whether king or peasant, a harmonious family is the greatest happiness." — Johann Wolfgang von Goethe
footer.brandDesc: Helping cross-border Chinese families understand Canadian legal culture, protect family relationships, and promote cross-cultural harmony.

hero.title: Protecting Cross-Border Families Starts with Understanding
hero.subtitle: Moving to Canada is more than a change of address. Differences in law and culture can quietly hurt the people closest to you. CrossBorder JiaHe helps you understand Canadian family law, prevent cultural misunderstandings, and protect family harmony.

home.goetheQuote: "Whether king or peasant, a harmonious family is the greatest happiness."

mission.title: Cultural Differences Shouldn't Be a Hidden Harm to Families
mission.desc: Every immigrant family deserves to be understood. Founded by Attorney Alice Qiu, CrossBorder JiaHe focuses on helping cross-border Chinese families identify legal and cultural risks, providing education and support so every family can thrive in their new home.

cases.title: These Things Happen Every Day
cases.subtitle: The harm caused by cultural misunderstandings often runs deeper than we imagine
cases.case1Desc: A Chinese couple's habit of expressing emotions loudly led to the husband being charged after a neighbor called the police. The wife was devastated — this was simply how they communicated back in China.
cases.case2Title: The Cost of Doing Homework for Your Child
cases.case2Desc: A mother forced her child to submit homework she had written herself. After being discovered by the teacher, the mother lost custody. She had no idea this was a serious violation in Canada.
cases.case3Desc: A mother demanded financial support from her adult children following Chinese customs. When they refused, the relationship broke down. Neither side understood that Canadian law has completely different provisions for this.
cases.cta: Learn How to Prevent These Risks

services.title: Comprehensive Protection for Your Cross-Border Family
services.subtitle: From risk identification to cultural education, from family mediation to legal referrals — CrossBorder JiaHe walks with you every step of the way

serviceMagicMirror.label: AI-Powered
serviceMagicMirror.title: Magic Mirror
serviceMagicMirror.slogan: Magic Mirror, tell me the truth about this person...
serviceMagicMirror.desc: An AI risk identification tool designed for cross-border relationships and business partnerships. Before making important decisions, discover potential legal and cultural risks — so you can move forward with confidence.

serviceGrowthCamp.label: Community
serviceGrowthCamp.title: Growth Camp
serviceGrowthCamp.desc: A cultural education program centered around offline book clubs and real case sharing. Learn Canadian family law in a relaxed community atmosphere, meet fellow travelers, and grow together.

serviceAiMediation.label: Professional Support
serviceAiMediation.title: JiaHe Mediation Room
serviceAiMediation.desc: Lawyer referral and intelligent matching service. Based on your specific needs, we match you with the most suitable licensed attorney. Gentle mediation support for family legal matters including spousal and parent-child relationships.

aboutFounder.title: Attorney Alice Qiu
aboutFounder.subtitle: Founder of CrossBorder JiaHe
aboutFounder.tag1: Senior Attorney at a Thousand-Lawyer Firm
aboutFounder.tag3: Dual U.S. & Canadian Financial Advisor Licenses
aboutFounder.bio1: In 1998, Alice Qiu obtained her Chinese law license and joined DeHeng Law Firm, one of China's top-tier law firms with over a thousand practicing attorneys and offices in multiple cities across the country, where she specialized in cross-border investment and family law matters.
aboutFounder.bio2: After settling in Canada in 2005 with her family, Alice leveraged her deep understanding of both legal systems to coordinate professional legal services across provinces for Chinese colleagues investing or handling family disputes in Canada. Along the way, she discovered that many cross-border divorce and inheritance disputes couldn't be fully resolved through legal means alone — integrating insurance, guaranteed investment funds, and other financial tools was necessary to provide comprehensive help. This led her to obtain both U.S. and Canadian financial advisor licenses.
aboutFounder.bio3: Over the years, Alice has witnessed countless preventable family tragedies: husbands charged with crimes after loud arguments, mothers losing custody for helping children with homework, elderly parents severing ties with children due to misunderstandings about Canadian support laws... These experiences inspired her to found CrossBorder JiaHe — using education and companionship to protect every cross-border family.
aboutFounder.bio4: "Whether king or peasant, a harmonious family is the greatest happiness." These words are the heart of why I founded CrossBorder JiaHe.

whyUs.title: Why Choose CrossBorder JiaHe
whyUs.reason1Desc: Deep understanding of both Chinese and Canadian legal systems, precisely identifying cross-border legal risks
whyUs.reason2Desc: 25+ years of cross-border practice experience, deeply familiar with cultural differences and communication between China and Canada
whyUs.reason3Desc: Providing education and identification before crises occur, rather than remedies after the fact
whyUs.reason4Desc: All services designed around the goal of family harmony, not merely legal interests

trust.title: Connect with Licensed Attorneys
trust.subtitle: CrossBorder JiaHe is a lawyer referral platform. All attorneys are credential-verified.
trust.feature1Desc: Every attorney is subject to rigorous credential review and background verification before joining.
trust.feature2Desc: Your personal information is strictly confidential. No third-party sharing, ever.
trust.feature3Desc: Certified attorneys display an exclusive badge so you can identify trusted professionals at a glance.

aiMediation.title: JiaHe Mediation Room
aiMediation.subtitle: Guided by our Blue Fairy, helping you express, understand, and reconcile
aiMediation.modeDesc: Whether speaking alone or mediating together, the Blue Fairy is here for you
aiMediation.singleDesc: Share your concerns with the Blue Fairy and receive emotional support and legal guidance
aiMediation.dualDesc: Invite the other party to participate; let AI assist both sides in communicating and understanding
aiMediation.shareDesc: Successfully invite 1 new user, and both you and they receive 1 hour of mediation time (worth ¥299) or 2 free Magic Mirror uses
aiMediation.shareText: I'm using CrossBorder JiaHe's Blue Fairy AI Mediation to help process emotions and resolve family conflicts. I recommend you try it too!
aiMediation.disclaimer: Mediation provides emotional support and legal information, not formal legal advice. It does not replace professional legal or psychological services. In case of emergency, please call 911.
aiMediation.selectFirst: Please select a mediation mode first
aiMediation.singleWelcome: Hello, I'm the Blue Fairy. Please feel free to share your concerns — I'll listen carefully and offer support.
aiMediation.dualWelcome: Hello everyone, I'm the Blue Fairy mediation assistant. I'll help both of you communicate and understand each other with a neutral and gentle approach. Please take turns sharing your thoughts.
aiMediation.inputPlaceholder: Share your concerns with the Blue Fairy...

certification.title: Peace of Mind Certification
certification.slogan: I Disclose Openly, So Love Can Be at Ease
certification.desc: A voluntary transparency program that allows you to proactively share verified information and receive a trusted blue badge on our platform. This certification demonstrates your commitment to openness and honesty, helping you build stronger, more confident relationships within our community.
certification.subDesc: Peace of Mind Certification is the core trust mechanism of the CrossBorder JiaHe platform. Users who are willing to build relationships with sincerity gain honor and priority both on and off the platform.
certification.badgeDesc: Unified blue badge display across the platform for priority attention

certification.badgeMirror: Risk level automatically lowered when screened; report marked as certified
certification.badgeList: Priority display in interactions and matching lists
certification.badgeEvent: Highlighted at events and exclusive offline seats
certification.mirrorLinkDesc: When a certified user is screened by others via Magic Mirror, the report highlights "Passed Platform Peace of Mind Certification" and the risk level is automatically lowered by one tier. Blue badge users carry higher credibility.
certification.processDesc: 4 steps to complete the loop and quickly earn your blue badge
certification.step3Desc: Final review by Attorney Qiu's team (1-2 business days)
